===Pokémon Zensho===
[[File:Agatha Zensho.png|thumb|100px|Agatha in Pokémon Zensho]]
Agatha appears in [[PZ10]] as the third member of the Elite Four. She challenges {{Zensho|Satoshi}} with her Gengar and is defeated, advancing Satoshi to the next room.
